text:
In the first scene, I feel like an observer peering into a glass-walled world of focused activity. Separated from the group, I sense both curiosity and detachment—my presence unnoticed, yet my mind engaged in silent contemplation.

In the second scene, colors and symbols envelop me. The wall proclaims development and progress—R+D. Here I sense inspiration and motivation, the energy of innovation. The world seems full of possibilities, urging me to connect thought and action, theory and practice.
